story.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
story.summary: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

points.heading: Former OpenAI Exec Joins Stoke
points.detail: Kevin Weil, a veteran tech executive, has joined the board of Stoke Space, a Seattle startup building reusable rockets.

points.heading: Brings Fundraising, Network Expertise
points.detail: Weil brings fundraising knowledge, network, and Silicon Valley experience to Stoke Space, having been an early investor.

points.heading: Stoke Space's Reusable Rockets
points.detail: Stoke Space is building reusable rockets, like Nova, to compete with SpaceX, aiming for a completely reusable model to fly this year.

points.heading: Addresses Unsolved Launch Problems
points.detail: The world realizes launch is "still not solved," and full, rapid reuse is seen as inevitable for space data centers and military contracts.
